reservation.source_phrase: Due to capacity restraints, we cannot accept late arrivals. Please plan to arrive 15 minutes before your tour to check in.
reservation.source_block:
VISITOR GUIDELINES
Your purchase signifies that you read and agree to the following Visitor Guidelines:
Rescheduling: We do not have the staff resources to accommodate requests for rescheduling your tickets. Your date and time of ticket sale are final.
All sales final: Your date and time of ticket sale are final. Refunds and rescheduling are not available.
On-time arrival: Due to capacity restraints, we cannot accept late arrivals. Please plan to arrive 15 minutes before your tour to check in. No refunds will be offered for late arrivals.

hours.source_block: Open daily, 10 A.M.-5 P.M. • #1 Historical Home Tour in the U.S. by Newsweek
